zh.Jarnac, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Fran: 法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alix de Garlande於大約1216年出生在法國瑟-吉馬內時，她的父親Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye20歲，母親Alix de Rumigny20歲。她和Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1284年12月21日享年69歲。

zh-hans.Jarnac, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Fran: 法国波特-哈倫斯哈倫特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alix de Garlande于大约1216年出生在法国瑟-吉馬內时，她的父亲Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye20岁，母亲Alix de Rumigny20岁。她和Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1284年12月21日享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Garlande
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English gerlond, ger(e)land, garlond ‘metal chaplet, crown, coronet; wreath’, probably a nickname denoting a habitual wearer of such items, or a metonymic occupational name for a maker of them.

English: perhaps from the Old French personal name Gerland (ancient Germanic Garuland, probably from garw- ‘war-gear; prepared(ness)’ + land ‘land’; the first element of the French name may instead be from a name beginning with gēr ‘spear’).

English: topographic name from Middle English gor(e), gar(e) ‘triangular piece’ + lond ‘land’ (Old English gāra + land, lond), for someone who lived ‘(at the) triangular piece of land’. Compare Garfield .

variants.name: Gerland
meanings: English (North Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Garland  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Garfield
meanings: English (Midlands): topographic name from Middle English gor(e), gar(e) ‘triangular piece’ + feld ‘open country, field’ (Old English gār + feld), for someone who lived by a triangular piece of land.
English: alternatively, sometimes perhaps a variant of Carville (a name of Norman origin), with excrescent final -d.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Gartland
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Garland  .
Irish (northern Leinster and southern Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Mac Gearnúin, a patronymic from the Norman personal name Gernon .

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alix de Garlande was born about 1216, in Seine-et-Marne, France, her father, Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye, was 20 and her mother, Alix de Rumigny, was 20. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon. She died on 21 December 1284, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alix de Garlande est née environ 1216, à Seine-et-Marne, France, son père, Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Alix de Rumigny, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon. Elle est décédée le 21 décembre 1284, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alix de Garlande um 1216 in Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye 20 und ihre Mutter Alix de Rumigny 20. Sie hatte mit Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 21. Dezember 1284 im Alter von 69 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Garlande è nata il circa 1216 nel Seine-et-Marne, Francia, sua padre, Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Alix de Rumigny, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon. Morì il 21 dicembre 1284, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alix de Garlandeが約1216年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンで生まれた時，父Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssayeは20歳，母Alix de Rumignyは20歳であった。彼女はAdam II 'the Old' de Villebéonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1284年12月21日に69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alix de Garlande(이)가 대략 1216년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix de Rumigny(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1284년 12월 21일 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Garlande nasceu aproximadamente 1216, em Seine-et-Marne, França, seu pai, Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Rumigny, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon. Ela faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1284, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alix de Garlande родилась около 1216 г. в местности сине-ет-марн, Франция, её отцу по имени Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de Rumigny, 20. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon. Она умерла 21 декабря 1284 г. в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alix de Garlande nació aproximadamente 1216, en Seine-et-Marne, Francia, su papá, Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Alix de Rumigny, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon. Murió el 21 de diciembre de 1284, a la edad de 69 años.
